CVE-2024-29038.title: tpm2-tools is the source repository for the Trusted Platform Modu ...
CVE-2024-29038.summary: tpm2-tools is the source repository for the Trusted Platform Module (TPM2.0) tools. A malicious attacker can generate arbitrary quote data which is not detected by `tpm2 checkquote`. This issue was patched in version 5.7.

CVE-2024-29039.title: tpm2 is the source repository for the Trusted Platform Module (TP ...
CVE-2024-29039.summary: tpm2 is the source repository for the Trusted Platform Module (TPM2.0) tools. This vulnerability allows attackers to manipulate tpm2_checkquote outputs by altering the TPML_PCR_SELECTION in the PCR input file.  As a result, digest values are incorrectly mapped to PCR slots and banks, providing a misleading picture of the TPM state. This issue has been patched in version 5.7.
